titleStmt.title: SII 36.97: original edition by P Shanmugam
No. 97. (A.R. No. 97 of 1910.) TIRUMĀḶAM (Kōviltirumāḷam), NANNILAM TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT. On the north wall of the central shrine in the Māgāḷēśvara temple.

summary.p: Damaged and incomplete. Gift of land situated in the western part of the village Nāgapuram as viḻāp-puram by the Nagaram of Ambar to Chaṇḍēśvara, māhēśvaras, śrīkāriyam, and the members of the priests (pañchāchāriyar) of the Mākāḷamuḍaiyār temple at Ambar, in Ambar-nāḍu, a subdivision of Uyyakkoṇḍār-vaḷanāḍu. Since the Nagaram of Ambar could not cultivate the lands situated in the village Tiruvari, an old dēvadāṉa, they preferred to gift another piece of land with the same area and in this connection the above gift was made.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī pūmātu puṇarap puvimātu vaḷara nāmātu viḷaṅka jayamātu virumpa tantiruppatu malar mannavar cūṭa manniya Urimaiyāl maṇimuṭi cūṭi ceṅkol cenṟu ticai toṟum vaḷarppa ve
ṅkali nīṅki meyyaṟan taḻaippa kaliṅkamiriyak kaṭamalai naṭātti valaṅkoḷāḻi varaiyāḻi naṭātti Irucuṭaraḷavum Orukuṭai niḻaṟṟi cempon vīrasimhāsanattu tripuvanamuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum vīṟṟiruntaruḷi
ya kopparakecaripanmarāna tribhuvanac cakravattikaḷ śrī vikramacoḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 6 Āvatu Āni māsattu tiṅkaṭkiḻamai peṟṟa tiruvoṇamum tritikaiyumāna nāḷ Uyyakkoṇṭār vaḷanāṭṭu Ampar
nāṭṭu Ampar nakarattom Uṭaiyār tirumākāḷamuṭaiyār tripuvanacaṇṭeśvarateva kanmikaḷukkum śrīmāheśvararkkum śrīkāriyam ceyvārkaḷukkum patipāta mūlappaṭṭuṭaip pañcācāriyarkaḷukkum Ina
karattukku camaiñca nāraṇakkuṭaiyān nakkan tirumākāḷamuṭaiyānum panaṅkuṭaiyān puṟṟiṭaṅ koṇṭān tillaināyakanum Uḷḷiṭṭom Ittevar paḻantevatānam tiruvariyil Amparkkaḷ
viḻāppuṟamāy Eṅkaḷ nakarattoṭe kūṭṭi Ittevarkku Iṟuttu varukiṟa Amparkaḷ viḻāppuṟam mūṉṟe mukkāle Iraṇṭu mā mukkāṇi muntirikaik kīḻ nālu māvukkum nāṅkaḷ Iṟuttu varukiṟa
paṭi Iṟukkamāṭṭāmaiyil Eṅkaḷūr meṟpiṭākai nākapurattile nāṅkaḷ piṟittu piramāṇam paṇṇik kuṭutta nilamāvatu tenpāṟkellai nāṅkaḷ munpu It tevaṟku viṟṟa Iṟaiyili nilattukkum E
ṅkaḷūr nampi tiruvukku viṭṭa Iṟaiyili nilattukkum tiruccempuṟamuṭaiya mahādevar tevatānattukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai tirumākāḷavatikku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai Eṅkaḷ nakara
ttu natta nilam Oru māvaraikkum Ita Ittevar tirukkāmakkoṭṭattu Āḷuṭaiyār Iṟaiyili nilattukkum Ittevar tirukkaṭavū(r)rāna Iṟaiyili nilattukku teṟkum
kīḻpāṟkellai Ittevar caṭṭippuṟattukku karumukaippuṟattukkum tiruccempuṟamuṭaiya mahādevar devatāṉattukku meṟkum Ivvicainta perunānkellaiyuḷ na
ṭuvupaṭṭa kaḷarum nattaṅkaḷ Innilam mūṉṟe mukkāle Iraṇṭu mā mukkāṇi mu
ntirikaik kīḻ nālu māvum Ittevar tiripuvanacaṇṭecuvara tevakaṉmikaḷukkum śrī māhēśvararkkum śrīkāriyañ ceyvārkaḷukkum śrīpatipātamūlappaṭṭuṭaip pañcā
cāriyarkaḷukkum Ivviḻāppuṟa nilam mūnṟe mukkāle Iraṇṭu mā mukkāṇi muntirikai nālu māvum can=tirātittavaṟ cācuvatikamāka piramāṇam paṇṇik kuṭuttom Ampar nakarattukku camai
nta nāraṇakkuṭaiyāṉ nakkaṉ tirumākāḷamuṭaiyānum panaṅkuṭaiyān puṟṟiṭaṅkoṇṭān tillaināyakanum Uḷḷiṭṭa nakarattom Ippiramāṇam Eḻutinen madhyattan Amparuṭaiyān tirukkā
yāna cantiracekaraṉ civaña num panaṅkuṭaiyān puṟṟiṭa kanum ciṟu ve
Digital edition of SII 36.97 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
